title: AnnounceBossBarZ
description: A bossbar that announces stuff for your server of each set time
body:
AnnounceBossBarZ: Why Choose This Plugin?

The plugin revolutionizes how server administrators communicate with players by transforming ordinary announcements into eye-catching, professional notifications using Minecraft's BossBar feature. Unlike traditional chat messages that quickly disappear, AnnounceBossBarZ ensures your important information is prominently displayed at the top of players' screens.

Key Features:

High Visibility - Announcements appear as boss bars at the top of the screen where players can't miss them

Fully Customizable - Configure colors, styles, display duration, and intervals between messages

Dynamic Appearance - Choose from multiple BossBar colors and styles that can change with each announcement

Flexible Scheduling - Set announcements to display at regular intervals or in random order

Simple Configuration - Easy-to-understand YAML configuration with detailed comments

Performance Optimized - Lightweight implementation with minimal server resource usage

Permission-Based Control - Admin commands secured with proper permission system

Color Code Support - Full support for Minecraft color codes in your announcements

Perfect For:

Server rules reminders

Event announcements

Website and Discord promotions

Vote incentives

Server maintenance notifications

Welcome messages

Daily tips and tricks

The plugin  stands out from other announcement plugins because it leverages the visually striking BossBar API rather than traditional chat messages that get lost in conversation. The professional presentation gives your server a polished feel while ensuring important information reaches every player.

Server owners particularly value the plugin's reliability and customization options. You can fine-tune every aspect of your announcements - from how long they display to their visual style - creating a communication system that perfectly matches your server's unique brand and needs.
